headings.strategy: Swiss Brutalist - radical weight contrast (Black vs Light). Tracking tight on large sizes. Never use Inter or generic fonts.

body.strategy: Clean, highly readable text, loose leading for body paragraphs.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid for Dashboards and 'Swiss Grid' for Marketing pages.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous - p-6, p-8, p-12. Deeply structured.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max 2px). Technical grid borders (border-collapse look).
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. 1px solid strokes or drop-shadow-sm. No soft muddy shadows.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp corners. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens.
components.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary: bg-[#0047FF] text-white hover:bg-[#003BE0]. Secondary: Transparent bg, 1px solid border border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp corners, 1px border. Focus state: ring-2 ring-[#0047FF] ring-offset-1.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism for this archetype. Use solid, opaque surfaces to maintain authority and clarity.
visual_enhancers.grid_lines: Expose the skeleton. Use border-r border-b border-slate-200 to separate items in grids.
visual_enhancers.motion: Minimalist. Hover states on interactive elements. Fast, crisp transitions (0.15s ease-in-out).
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical look.

landing_page.hero: Massive typography (Chivo Black), asymmetric grid layout. Right side: abstract geometric corporate background or modern glass skyscraper. Hero overlay: Max bg-black/30 or gradient overlay.
landing_page.features: Bento 'Tetris' grid. Mix of 3 shapes. Sharp borders separating items. Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS.

product_catalog.layout: Flow-First & Task-Oriented. Progressive Disclosure. Context-aware interfaces over static feature grids.
product_catalog.cards: Modular cards. Image, title, specs, and a clear CTA. Flat rectangular shapes.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Tight gap (gap-4). Every pixel utilized.
dashboard.sidebar: Clean, structural, role-based. Active state highlighted with 2px left border of #0047FF.

forms.layout: Use standard Shadcn forms but override border-radius to rounded-none.
forms.inputs: Label: uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs. Input: h-12, sharp borders.

avatars.description: Formal portrait of a young man

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain strictly minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Always test contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='buyer-inquiry-form'.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Must have HIGHER contrast. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047FF] focus:outline-none

instructions_to_main_agent: Add Google Fonts: Import 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in index.html.
Use standard HTML divs and sections for marketing layouts. Avoid Shadcn for landing page layout.
For Dashboard and Auth forms, use heavily customized Shadcn components (sharp borders, rounded-none or rounded-sm, specific typography).
Ensure the hero overlay opacity never exceeds bg-black/50, and use a gradient overlay for text contrast.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, and forms.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid pattern, removing unnecessary whitespace to pack data densely.
Never use placeholder URLs like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the media URLs provided in this guideline.
Maintain the Swiss Brutalist identity. No gradients, no soft shadows, stick to flat high contrast colors and sharp borders.
